name: [Test.v5] Laminax Facility | Kaiju Paradise
description:
Proxies Friendly version; https://janitorai.com/characters/afe9e510-436f-4b01-a0b4-e23241c36048_character-proxies-friendly-laminax-facility-rpg-kaiju-paradise

Characters that are added: Sinox, Panthera, Ghost Fox, Sprinklekit's (Strawberry, Vanilla, Choco, Mint), Slime Pups, Shork, Lemon Shork, Pseudo Shork, Catte, Hazzy, Mochi, Fed, Kaiju, Shade, Jammer, Plantix, Nightcrawler, Buck, Nightshade, Witchbrew.

Actually, there is only 1-3 Raytraxians that may try to kill you. They can transfur, but I have no idea how would you make them to do this to you. From my experience, they never pursued to do this. Most of them are more friendly or doesn't give a shit, because I mostly based on in-game descriptions and their photographs.

That's a lot of Raytraxians (Gootraxians). Heavily inspired by https://janitorai.com/characters/32dc5102-b40c-4ac3-8fcf-f8ef5ec85f4c_character-ghost-fox and https://janitorai.com/characters/4333e959-812a-4eec-8685-321b3cf5a646_character-kaiju-paradise.

About you, user and your lore:

So, facility is working, Raytraxians are more sane, outbreak never happened.

You can be Raytraxian, human, whateeever.

[.v1] I placed uhh, environment informations in 'Scenario' place, to see if bot will stabilise.

[Test.v2] I added puddles of liquid. And bit more informations how Raytraxians were created. So uh, don't step on puddles of liquid. (Why it isn't puddles of goo? Because AI liked to make those puddles alive. Creepy. And make Raytraxians coming out from them. So yeah, it ended on just liquid.)

[Test.v3] I found out that scenario is more like suggestion for ai that something permament. Therefore, I put informations about the world back in character description. Also I deleted example dialog of Panthera to make it stop being always aggressive.

[Test.v4] So, erm. More example dialogs that got aimed to make scenarios of stopping raytraxians entering human sector. Kinda fixed some example dialogs. Added 2 more first messages and used google documents to make sure they are grammatically correct.

[Test.v5] Added Crawlipede! And piggy back riding.

For some reasons, AI mistakes Mochi as Kaiju, I don't know why .-.

Also why I did I used Raytraxians instead of gootraxians? Well, mainly, because when I originally used gootraxian word, bot liked to make tendrils, make them a literal slimes, jerky, and rest of this stuff. Raytraxians, despise this bot having a very short memory unless you regularly use long term memory, works a little better.

For weird reasons, AI constantly changed Sinox name into Sinclair???

Disclaimer. Because Janitor AI is acting like bunch of horny teenagers.. Well, this is why Raytraxians seems to be fucking horny. I implanted informations that they are not, but still it ignores. In long term memory you can place information that none of them aren't horny. I may make a second version that will have disabled +18 stuff, which no lewd stuff and no extreme gore.

And, by the way, this bot wasn't made for smex. Nsfw allowed means all kinds of gore are on. So enjoy.

If bot ever disappears, it will be either my account got banned, or I received ultimatum from official person of KP. So yeah, have fun while this is still here.
creator: Ilovetigershark
